case_title: MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC VS. CREST AUTO BROKERS, INC., A GEORGIA CORPORATION; ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COST (TRANSACTION ID # 17180058) FILED BY PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S MOTION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO ALL THREE RESPONDENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216, GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Requesting Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Requesting Attorney Fees And Costs

Petitioner Main Street Business Loans, LLC's motion for confirmation of arbitration award is granted as to all three respondents. Proofs of service were filed as to all three respondents. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
